title: QPB harness job manifest
description: Per-run manifest written by `qpb_harness_tick.py --init` to run-NN/manifest.json. The queue/ and claimed/ job-NNNNN.json files wrap a plan entry under {job_id, run, entry}; this schema describes the run-NN/manifest.json projection the harness and any monitor read.

task_id.description: Matches the plan entry's task_id and the heartbeat task_id.

target_repo.description: Absolute path the QPB worker reviews.

job_id.description: Job id (job-00001, …). The queue→claimed→results file moves key off this.
